concept: An intimate, archival exploration of the Heritage vine gold bangles, highlighting the intricate handwork, rich 22k gold, and the timeless elegance of traditional Indian craftsmanship under a single, warm light.

product.name: Heritage vine gold bangles (pair)
product.material: 22k yellow gold bangle pair, hand-engraved vine and leaf motifs with applied granulation and milgrain borders
product.notes: matched pair, heritage Indian goldwork, one bangle with filigree leaf-work, the other with engraved vine and granulation detail, rich warm gold finish, intended to be worn stacked

style.palette: deep obsidian black with warm amber highlights
style.lighting: single soft rim light from upper-left, controlled specular on metal, clean shadow falloff
style.mood: quiet, patient, expensive; the stillness of an empty gallery
style.environment: abstract matte black surface with faint warm atmospheric haze and slow-drifting dust motes
style.grade: high-contrast cinematic, subtle film grain, warm black point

shots.intent: To introduce the intricate hand-engraved details and granulation, emphasizing the artistry of the bangles.
shots.scene_description: An extreme close-up of the filigree leaf-work and granulated beads on one gold bangle, bathed in a low, warm tungsten light that slowly rolls across the highly textured surface, revealing its depth and craftsmanship against a deep brown, softly rippling satin background.
shots.frame_prompt: extreme macro close-up of the Heritage vine gold bangles (pair), 22k yellow gold bangle pair, hand-engraved vine and leaf motifs with applied granulation and milgrain borders. Subtle particle and light movement is welcome; no character appears; no cuts; consistent lighting and colour grade across the clip.

shots.intent: To showcase both bangles as a matching pair, highlighting their unique textures and the rich luster of the gold as light plays across their surfaces.
shots.scene_description: The two 22k gold bangles are stacked elegantly on a dark, rich brown satin surface. A single warm key light from the left casts gentle shadows and highlights, emphasizing the milgrain borders and engraved vine motifs as the scene slowly rotates.

shots.intent: To provide a wider, yet still intimate, view of the complete bangle pair, establishing their presence and the luxurious, heritage setting.
shots.scene_description: The stacked pair of heritage gold bangles rests prominently on a rumpled dark brown satin, with subtle folds in the fabric visible. Tiny, almost imperceptible dust motes drift gently in the warm, low light, creating an atmosphere of quiet tradition and timeless beauty.
